@everyone

Star Atlas Presentation at Solana Crossroads

You know Star Atlas likes to bring the heat at Solana events, and Solana Crossroads is no different. CEO Michael Wagner will be presenting tomorrow, providing updates and announcing some new and exciting developments. You're not going to want to miss it.   

 When:  ()
 Where: Solana Crossroads coverage is being streamed at https://www.youtube.com/@TheDefiant/streams
